name: coaltipple
description: CoalTipple — a model/effort router for subagent-capable coding agents (the dispatch layer of the TheColliery mining series).

plugins.name: coaltipple
plugins.description: Model/effort router: delegate a task you CAN do but is large+cheap DOWN to a lower tier to save tokens; escalate a task beyond the current tier UP for quality. Two-knob routing (tier × effort, effort-before-tier), introspection-first model classification, a validity-gated ranking Lock that never routes on broken state, and git-optional damage control. Advise-only Phoenix-pure hook; the model performs the routing. Subagent-capable platforms only.
